lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 — My World: Family, Home & Neighborhood
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 2 — My World

listenings.text: Hello! My name is Ana. I live in a small apartment near the park. My apartment has two bedrooms and a sunny kitchen. The kitchen is my favorite room. I cook there every evening. My neighborhood is quiet, and my neighbors are very friendly. My sister lives near me. Her home is big and beautiful. I love my little corner of the city.

Hi! I am Carlos. Let me tell you about my family. My family is big. I have two brothers and one sister. My brothers live in Santos, and my sister lives in Campinas. My mother lives with me. She is eighty years old, and she cooks wonderful food. My wife and I have one daughter. Her name is Laura. Family is everything for me.

extra_audio.text: I live in an apartment in Pinheiros. My home is small but comfortable. The kitchen is my favorite room. My neighborhood has many trees. My neighbors are friendly.
